@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor ∧ callback_to_async/await
C: loadUser ∧ callback ∧ next(err) ∧ error ∧ path
P: loadUser ∧ refactor -> async ∧ await
V: preserve ∧ next(err) ∧ path
A: verify ∧ minimal_diff ∧ same_execution_order

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor and callback_to_async/await.
Constraints: loadUser and callback and next(err) and error and path.
Plan: loadUser and refactor then async and await.
Verify: preserve and next(err) and path.
Answer target: verify and minimal_diff and same_execution_order.
